name: workflow
desc: Core package for defining and running durable workflows and activities. Supports long-running persistent workflows, retries, queues, parallel execution, workfl…
descFull: Core package for defining and running durable workflows and activities. Supports long-running persistent workflows, retries, queues, parallel execution, workflow monitoring, dedicated storage connections, and orchestration for microservices, data pipelines, sagas, agentic workflows, and other complex business processes.
